inputs.label: Operating Temperature
inputs.businessContext: The operating temperature of the component or system in degrees Celsius.

businessContext_i18n.en: The operating temperature of the component or system in degrees Celsius.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bileşenin veya sistemin santigrat derece cinsinden çalışma sıcaklığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Betriebstemperatur der Komponente oder des Systems in Grad Celsius.

inputs.label: Reference Temperature
inputs.businessContext: The reference temperature at which standard aging data is known.

businessContext_i18n.en: The reference temperature at which standard aging data is known.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart yaşlanma verilerinin bilindiği referans sıcaklık.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Referenztemperatur, bei der Standard-Alterungsdaten bekannt sind.

inputs.label: Activation Energy
inputs.businessContext: Activation energy for the aging process, typically in electron volts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Activation energy for the aging process, typically in electron volts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaşlanma süreci için tipik olarak elektron volt cinsinden aktivasyon enerjisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktivierungsenergie für den Alterungsprozess, typischerweise in Elektronenvolt.

inputs.label: Reference Time
inputs.businessContext: The duration at reference conditions for which aging is compared.

businessContext_i18n.en: The duration at reference conditions for which aging is compared.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Dauer unter Referenzbedingungen, mit der die Alterung verglichen wird.

inputs.label: Treatment Effectiveness
inputs.businessContext: Effectiveness factor of the anti-aging treatment, ranging from 0 (no effect) to 1 (fully effective).

businessContext_i18n.en: Effectiveness factor of the anti-aging treatment, ranging from 0 (no effect) to 1 (fully effective).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaşlanma karşıtı tedavinin etkinlik faktörü, 0 (etkisiz) ile 1 (tam etkili) arasında değişir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wirksamkeitsfaktor der Anti-Aging-Behandlung, von 0 (keine Wirkung) bis 1 (voll wirksam).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
